name: Python Type Safety Promotion Gate
purpose: Prevent promotion of Python scripts to reusable or core roles without type-safety evidence.
pass_condition: Promotion request includes required strict evidence for target maturity and no unresolved contract-critical type-chaos.
fail_condition: Promotion attempted without strict evidence or strict-clean claim made without proof.
stop_condition: Maturity classification missing, evidence missing, or mass-type-refactor attempted outside scoped gate task.

maturity_level_rules.EXPERIMENTAL: Allowed without strict, no promotion claim.
maturity_level_rules.TASK_LOCAL: Allowed without strict, must remain task-bound.
